21.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

21.gl: to be new; causatively, to rebuild

22.gl: properly, vehemence, i.e. (with or without preposition) vehemently; by implication, wholly, speedily, etc. (often with other words as an intensive or superlative; especially when repeated)
22.kj: diligently, especially, exceeding(-ly), far, fast, good, great(-ly), [idiom] louder and louder, might(-ily, -y), (so) much, quickly, (so) sore, utterly, very ([phrase] much, sore),
abhor, cast away (off), contemn, despise, disdain, (become) loathe(some), melt away, refuse, reject, reprobate, [idiom] utterly, vile person.

22.gl: to crack off, i.e. (figuratively) burst out in rage
22.kj: (be) anger(-ry), displease, fret self, (provoke to) wrath (come), be wroth.
